subcodes.title: Words to a woman questioner, spoken on 1913-04-22
subcodes.first_line: You must enter in the Kingdom of Abha. In the Kingdom of Abha, there is light upon light. The darkness of sorrow and pain is banished forever
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @light and darkness, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @spiritual transformation, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
